policy: Curated public portfolio entries only. Public repositories are never added automatically.

projects.title: Hotel Comp Policy Model
projects.summary: Explainable service-recovery decision support that compares feasible guest gestures while keeping cost, constraints, and manager judgment visible.

demo.title: Hotel Decision Desk
demo.task: Run a synthetic service-recovery scenario and inspect the recommendation, alternatives, and assumptions.
demo.dataBoundary: Built-in or user-entered synthetic scenarios only; no guest records or internal hotel policy.

projects.title: Assessment Intelligence
projects.summary: SQL-backed assessment reporting that turns shared synthetic extracts into growth, participation, completion, and data-quality decisions.

demo.title: Assessment Analytics
demo.task: Inspect trends, compare groups, and review readiness signals from the published assessment extracts.
demo.dataBoundary: Synthetic records generated from the same public SQL extracts used by the reporting workflow.

projects.title: Content Intelligence
projects.summary: A source-preserving content pipeline that produces reviewed retrieval records and cited answers from public-safe inputs.

demo.title: Content Intelligence RAG
demo.task: Ask how the conversion, information-object, retrieval, citation, and safety workflows operate.
demo.dataBoundary: Reviewed public-safe method and evidence records; raw private source material is excluded.

projects.title: Education Data Simulation Engine
projects.summary: A validated synthetic education warehouse that supports reproducible analytics prototypes without exposing private records.

demo.title: Education Data Lab
demo.task: Ask statistical and operational questions and receive structured tables, charts, and analysis notes.
demo.dataBoundary: Read-only analysis over a validated synthetic education warehouse.

projects.title: Assessment Growth Analytics in R
projects.summary: R-based growth analytics with model diagnostics, expected-growth validation, and stakeholder reporting.

projects.title: Graduate Statistics Portfolio
projects.summary: Curated graduate statistics evidence covering model search, validation, calibration, thresholds, and diagnostics.

projects.title: Assessment-to-Remediation Pipeline
projects.summary: A review-gated prototype connecting assessment diagnostics to feedback, dry-run LMS actions, and remediation evidence.

projects.title: Instructional AI Workflows
projects.summary: Human-reviewed instructional AI workflows for rubric evidence, feedback drafts, remediation plans, and reviewer packets.
